title: Tacu Tacu with Peruvian Rice
description: A fusion of traditional Peruvian rice with the intense flavor of tacu tacu.

ingredients.name: Intense cheese
ingredients.notes: such as queso fresco or feta

ingredients.name: Molten cheese
ingredients.notes: such as mozzarella or Monterey Jack

instructions: Cook the Peruvian rice according to package instructions.
In a large pan, combine the tacu tacu, intense cheese, molten cheese, green onions, and cilantro. Stir until well combined.
Add the cooked rice to the pan and stir until the ingredients are well mixed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the tacu tacu mixture in a bowl or on a plate.
Garnish with additional green onions and cilantro if desired.
